title: ctenitis ochrorachis var. ochrorachis
intro: Ctenitis ochrorachis var. ochrorachis, also known as the Ochre-veined Tree Fern, is a variety of tree fern that belongs to the family Dryopteridaceae. It is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, making it useful for treating various health issues. The health benefits of this plant include reducing inflammation, improving respiratory problems, and aiding in the treatment of skin conditions. The herbal preparations of Ctenitis ochrorachis var. ochrorachis include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
